general.name: payne4GAIN_summary
general.short: Summary table of the LTE and NLTE Payne fits of red giant spectra, as well as aspcap raw values, and NLTE corrected aspcap raw values.
general.description: We trained Payne models on grids of Turbospectrum_NLTE synthetic spectra: one in LTE and one in NLTE,  using departure coefficient grids calculated in MULTI. We chi-squared fit the APOGEE DR19 spectra that fall within our training range (according to ASPCAP) and present the results of our fits. We also perform a polynomial fit to the NLTE-LTE corrections, expecting them to vary smoothly with the stellar parameters, and apply them to the aspcap raw values. The aspcap raw values are also packaged with this VAC, for comparison.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

hdu0.description: Empty primary HDU conforming to FITS standard.
